/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/E2_class_exercise.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/E2_class_exercise.dir/Dungeon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/E2_class_exercise.dir/GameCharacter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/E2_class_exercise.dir/Weapon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/E2_class_exercise.dir/Dice.cpp.o -o E2_class_exercise
